items.title: NEWS: The Sixers will guarantee Adem Bona's $2,296,271 salary for 2026-27, a source tells @phillyvoice.com. That money was non-guaranteed if Bona was waived before July 7:
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
NEWS: The Sixers will guarantee Adem Bona's $2,296,271 salary for 2026-27, a source tells @phillyvoice.com. That money was non-guaranteed if Bona was waived before July 7:

www.phillyvoice.com/source-sixer...

media.title: Source: Sixers to retain Adem Bona, guaranteeing 2026-27 salary
media.description: The Sixers could have waived Adem Bona at no cost on Monday. Instead, he will make just under $2.3 million – all guaranteed – in his third NBA season.
